case_title: DICK CHANG VS. HILARY CORRITORE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CORRITORE, HILARY
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANG,DICK
EX PARTE APPLICATION AND ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT - SIGNED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANG,DICK
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANG,DICK SERVED OCT-18-2001, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT CORRITORE, HILARY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORRITORE, HILARY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 600 34TH AVE. APT. 2 S.F. CA., AND ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER CCP 415.46 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANG,DICK AS TO DEFENDANT CORRITORE, HILARY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
